title: Catalyst control and withdrawal valve with tight shutoff capability
abstract: A slide valve having a valve disc that is slidably movable between a fully-retracted fully-open position and a fully-extended fully-closed tight shutoff position by an actuating stem. The actuating stem is flexibly coupled to the valve disc. The valve disc is selectively modulated between the fully-extended fully-closed tight shutoff position and a partially-retracted non-tight shutoff position to prevent sticking of the valve disc in the fully-extended fully-closed tight shutoff position.
claims: 1. A slide gate valve for controlling the flow of gas, liquid and catalyst material comprising: a valve body having an internal chamber and formed to include an inlet, and an outlet; first and second spaced apart guide members positioned within the chamber, the members each include a guide channel and a wedge having a wedge surface; a valve member having a first side facing the inlet and an opposite second side, the valve member located between the first and second guide members and configured to slide along the guide members from a fully opened position in which gases, liquids or catalyst materials can pass from the inlet to the outlet to a fully closed position in which the flow of gases, liquids or catalyst materials are prevented from exiting the outlet, the valve member including a pair of wedges each having a wedge surface on the second side; wherein movement of the valve member from the fully opened position toward the fully closed position causes the valve member to slide linearly along the first and second guide members until a point in travel of the valve member where the cooperating wedge surfaces, cause translational movement of the valve member in the direction of the inlet to seal the inlet to A block flow from the inlet to the outlet; an orifice plate having refractory material positioned thereon; the orifice plate includes a sealing surface positioned adjacent the refractory material; the valve member includes a top surface having a center region having a refractory material; and the valve member includes a seat ring member positioned radially outwardly from the center region, the seat ring member adapted to form a seal within the housing when the valve member is in the fully closed position.
